services.cloudinary module¶

Cloudinary Service Module¶

This module provides integration with the Cloudinary service for managing image uploads, transformations, and generating public URLs for user avatars.

class services.cloudinary.CloudinaryService[source]¶

Bases: object

Service class for interacting with the Cloudinary API. Handles configuration and image processing operations.

upload_image(file, public_id: str)[source]¶

Uploads an image file to Cloudinary and returns a transformed URL.

The image is overwritten if the public_id already exists. The returned URL points to a version of the image cropped to a 250x250 square using the ‘fill’ method.

Parameters:

  • file (Any) – The file-like object or path to the image to be uploaded.

  • public_id (str) – The unique identifier (path) for the image in Cloudinary.

Returns:

A secure URL to the transformed image.

Return type:

str
